# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based frontend application that serves as the client interface for a comprehensive HR management system. It follows a component-driven architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript for type safety
- **Build Tool**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Routing**: React Router for client-side navigation
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens and shadcn/ui component library
- **State Management**: 
  - React Query for server state management and caching
  - Local component state for UI interactions
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with validation

### Backend Integration
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL) with real-time capabilities
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with role-based access control
- **API**: Direct Supabase client calls with Row Level Security
- **Edge Functions**: Serverless functions for complex business logic (payroll generation, notifications, AI processing)

## Key Components and Patterns

### Layout Components
- `AppLayout`: Main application shell with sidebar navigation
- `AppSidebar`: Collapsible navigation menu with role-based menu items
- `TopBar`: Global actions and user menu
- `NotificationBell`: Real-time notification system

### Feature Components
- **Employee Profile**: Modular tabs for attendance, leave, payroll, documents, and reviews
- **Leave Management**: Request forms, approval workflows, balance tracking
- **Payroll**: Automated calculations with overtime, allowances, and PDF generation
- **Settings**: Administrative configuration for company policies and system parameters

### UI Patterns
- **Data Tables**: Sortable, filterable tables with pagination
- **Modals**: Consistent modal patterns for forms and confirmations
- **Search Components**: Reusable searchable dropdowns (e.g., employee selection)
- **Status Badges**: Color-coded status indicators throughout the app

## Data Flow and Business Logic

### Employee Management
- Employee records stored in Supabase with relationships to departments, roles, and managers
- Profile data includes personal info, employment details, and organizational hierarchy
- Role-based permissions control access to sensitive information

### Attendance System
- Records stored with timestamps, working hours, and overtime calculations
- Monthly summaries with present/absent/late counts
- Integration with leave system for automatic absence marking

### Leave Management
- Leave types configured in settings (vacation, sick, personal)
- Balance tracking with automatic accrual
- Approval workflow with notifications

### Payroll Processing
- Automated monthly payroll generation
- Calculations include base salary, overtime, allowances, and deductions
- PDF invoice generation for employee records

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point with React Router setup
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with query client and routing
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Landing/dashboard page

### Component Architecture
- `src/components/layout/`: Layout and navigation components
- `src/components/ui/`: Reusable UI primitives from shadcn/ui
- `src/components/employee-profile/`: Employee detail view components
- `src/components/settings/`: Administrative configuration components

### Utility Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission checking
- `src/lib/format-date.ts`: Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending logic
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/`: Supabase client configuration and types
- `supabase/functions/`: Edge functions for backend processing

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `employees`: Employee master data
- `attendance_records`: Daily attendance entries
- `leave_requests`: Leave applications and approvals
- `payroll_records`: Monthly payroll data
- `projects`: Project management
- `departments`: Organizational structure
- `roles`: Permission roles

### Relationships
- Employees belong to departments and have roles
- Attendance and leave records reference employees
- Projects have team member assignments
- Reviews and increments link to employees

## Development Workflow

### Code Organization
- Feature-based component organization
- Shared UI components in dedicated directories
- Custom hooks for complex state logic
- Utility functions for common operations

### State Management Strategy
- React Query for server state (API data)
- Local state for UI interactions
- Optimistic updates for better UX
- Real-time subscriptions for live data

### Performance Considerations
- Code splitting by routes
- Lazy loading of heavy components
- Query caching and invalidation
- Optimized re-renders with memoization

## Security and Access Control

- Row Level Security (RLS) policies in Supabase
- Role-based UI rendering
- Secure API key management
- Input validation and sanitization
- Audit logging for sensitive operations

## Deployment and CI/CD

- Built with Vite for optimized production bundles
- Environment-specific configuration
- Automated testing with Vitest and Playwright
- Supabase migrations for database versioning
